product.title: Product
product.description: Premium jewelry ornament item in Simi's Catalog Store

name.description: Display name of the jewelry item

categoryLabel.description: Readable display name of the category

price.description: Discounted current offer price in INR

originalPrice.description: Standard list price before discount in INR

images.description: List of high-fidelity preview image absolute URLs

details.description: Specific material properties, dimensions or polishing criteria bullet points

isBestSeller.description: Marks this ornament as a highly-coveted customer choice

isNewArrival.description: Marks this as a freshly arrived collection

isCustomizable.description: Determines whether custom measurements or custom castings can be requested

rating.description: Aggregated user review rating score out of 5 stars

reviewsCount.description: Total number of review submissions received

stockCount.description: Current inventory status in physical counts

sizes.description: Standard gauge metrics available for order selection

arrivalDate.description: Formatted date text string defining arrival timing

admin_config.title: Admin Config
admin_config.description: Stores secure settings such as the administrator auth passcode

banned_ip.title: Banned IP
banned_ip.description: IP addresses restricted from website access due to multiple unauthorized attempts

failed_attempt.title: Failed Attempt
failed_attempt.description: Tracks count of failed passcode trials per IP

security_notification.title: Security Notification
security_notification.description: Event log containing information on unauthorized activities, locations, and timings

user.title: User
user.description: User profile with optional contact details and default delivery address

order_request.title: Order Request
order_request.description: Information about a requested order booking made via WhatsApp checkout, awaiting admin action

/products/{productId}.description: Central collection storing and serving persistent boutique products

/metadata/admin_config.description: Secure document storing the master administrative PIN

/banned_ips/{ip}.description: IP block ledger with unban capabilities

/security_notifications/{notificationId}.description: Airtight security audit log entries visible to administrators

/users/{userId}.description: Persistent profiles of jewelry buyers and their defaults

/order_requests/{orderRequestId}.description: Interactive pending orders placed by customers awaiting confirmation
